key_evidence: President Paz enacted law May 27 restoring executive authority to deploy armed forces in streets; simplified state-of-emergency procedures
Four confirmed deaths from blockade-related lack of medical care (oxygen, blocked emergency vehicles)
Clinicas de La Paz hospital oxygen reserves depleted; hospitals rationing critical supplies
Paz declared country 'at breaking point' May 27; blockades in fourth week
ACC dimension crosses into Critical at 20.0 — first sub-dimension Critical entry for Bolivia in current crisis arc

events.label: Military deployment law enacted + ≥4 confirmed deaths attributable to state failure during humanitarian blockade

methodology_note: Crisis has not resolved; HUMANITARIAN-BLOCKADE-FIRST-BASELINE-PROTOCOL reassess-on-resolution trigger not yet fired. Interim re-assessment justified by (a) institutional escalation event (military-deployment law), (b) confirmation of predicted humanitarian harm (4 deaths, oxygen depletion). Sub-apply-threshold composite delta (-2.5) but dimension specificity (ACC -5.0 to Critical, BND -5.0) warrants formal apply.
